Notice Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, And Applicatioin For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, Class Representative'S Individual Settlement And Enhancement, And Payment To Claims' Administrator
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MONI-CA NJOKU'S Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement. Appearances: Eric A. Grover, Esq. of Keller Grover LLP, (415) 543-1305, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. Enzo Der Boghossian, Esq. of Keller Grover LLP (415) 543-1305, appearing for Defendant Ecko Direct LLC. The tentative is not being contested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Order Granting Unopposed Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement, etc., and, Joint Judgment on Order of Final Approval of Class action settlement and dismissing action with prejudice, are both filed in Open Court. (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR # 13286
